# Jeong AI

> Jeong AI builds custom software, AI agents, and automated workflows for small businesses. A division of EBYG Media LLC.

Jeong AI is named after the Korean concept 정 (Jeong) — the bond that forms between people through consistent presence, genuine care, and quiet reliability over time. This philosophy drives every system we build.

## What We Do

Jeong AI solves operational friction for small businesses across four functions: Operations, Sales & Communication, Administration, and Finance & Reporting. We build systems that fit exactly how a business works — not the other way around.

### Services

- **AI Agents & Automation** — Custom AI agents and automated workflows embedded in existing tools (email, CRM, documents, project management). No ripping and replacing existing systems.
- **Custom Software** — Purpose-built applications: scheduling systems, client portals, internal tools, dashboards. Engineered around how your team actually works.
- **Professional Websites** — Clean, fast, mobile-responsive websites with ongoing management, security, and hosting included.

### Implementation Tiers

- **Jeong Assistant** ($2,500–$3,500) — Focused AI relief for administration: email summarization, document organization, meeting notes, scheduling support.
- **Jeong Operations Agent** ($4,000–$6,000) — Targets operations and sales: inbox triage, CRM updates, lead follow-up automation.
- **Jeong Business System** ($6,000–$10,000) — Full AI system across all four business functions.
- **Jeong Partner** (ongoing retainer) — Continuous AI operations partner with ongoing optimization and expansion.

### Digital Products

- **AI Starter Kit** ($29) — 13 curated AI tools, prompt library, setup guides, real automation examples for small businesses.
- **AI Automation Blueprint** ($79) — Everything in the Starter Kit plus the Jeong AI 4-stage framework, 20 workflow templates, interactive system builder, and implementation checklists.
- **Small Business AI Toolkit** ($149) — Complete AI system package with full playbooks, workflow examples across industries, templates, and a credit toward Jeong AI implementation.

- **Website:** https://www.jeongai.com

- **Location:** Fully remote, serving US small businesses
